'''Rajan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who fought in the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] during the end of the [[New Sith Wars]]. He had a black beard and a shaven head.

He served under [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Kiel Charny]] on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]], and was killed in the [[Sixth Battle of Ruusan]] after being trapped under a [[Tree/Legends|tree]] prior to the onslaught of the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]].

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi vs. Sith 3|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 3]] {{1st}}
*[[Jedi vs. Sith 4|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 4]]
*[[Jedi vs. Sith 5|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 5]]
